name: Exo Terra Glass Natural Terrarium Kit — Medium/Tall
shortDescription: Front-opening glass terrarium with dual doors and raised bottom frame for under-tank heaters.
description: The Exo Terra Glass Natural Terrarium is the ideal habitat for reptiles and amphibians. Front-opening dual doors allow easy access for feeding and maintenance. The raised bottom frame accommodates an Exo Terra Heat Mat, and the full-screen top allows for UVB and infrared penetration.
features: Raised bottom for heat mat compatibility

reviews.title: Perfect for my bearded dragon
reviews.body: Great build quality. The front doors make feeding and maintenance so much easier than top-opening tanks.

name: Zoo Med ReptiSun 10.0 UVB T5 HO Lamp — 24 inch
shortDescription: High-output 10.0 UVB lamp for desert reptiles like bearded dragons and iguanas.
description: The Zoo Med ReptiSun 10.0 T5 HO provides the UVB levels needed to prevent metabolic bone disease in desert reptiles. The High Output T5 bulb emits UVB up to 18 inches from the light source, ideal for taller enclosures.

name: Zilla Reptile Munchies Omnivore Mix
shortDescription: Dried omnivore blend with mealworms, veggies, and fruit for bearded dragons, blue-tongued skinks, and more.
description: Zilla Reptile Munchies Omnivore Mix is a convenient, nutritious blend of dried mealworms, vegetables, and fruits. Formulated for omnivorous reptiles, it can be fed dry or rehydrated with water.
features: Can be fed dry or rehydrated
